knowledge_items.title: Feature: Merchant QR Codes
knowledge_items.content:
Generation, batching, and management of static and dynamic QR codes for merchant stores, including bulk QR generation and external integrations.

Status: IMPLEMENTED

Capabilities:
- Generate static merchant QR codes
- Bulk-generate QR sets
- Resolve QR scans to payment requests

knowledge_items.title: Feature: Card Payments & Refunds
knowledge_items.content:
Card acquiring stack covering POS terminal payments, online card MIT flows, status mapping, and the full card refund lifecycle including merchant notifications and webhook processing.

Status: IMPLEMENTED

Capabilities:
- Process POS card payments via external acquirer
- Execute card MIT (merchant-initiated) payment flows
- Map external card statuses into internal payment states
- Handle card refund initiation, processing, and management
- Send refund webhooks and merchant notifications

knowledge_items.title: Feature: Request Logging, Error Filtering & Correlation
knowledge_items.content:
Cross-cutting HTTP middleware stack that tags every request with a correlation id, emits structured platform logs, and converts thrown errors into well-formed API responses.

Status: IMPLEMENTED

Capabilities:
- Attach correlation IDs to inbound requests for tracing
- Emit structured platform request/response logs
- Translate exceptions into consistent HTTP error payloads

knowledge_items.title: Feature: Employee Management
knowledge_items.content:
Invite, edit, and remove staff users on the merchant account, assigning each a role to control what they can do in the dashboard.

Status: IMPLEMENTED

Capabilities:
- Invite employees via email
- Assign roles/permissions to employees
- Edit or deactivate employees
- List active staff

knowledge_items.title: Feature: Atoa Employee Admin
knowledge_items.content:
Internal Atoa-employee accounts and admin tooling that gate ops/back-office operations against the rest of the platform.

Status: IMPLEMENTED

Capabilities:
- Manage internal employee accounts
- Authorise back-office actions

knowledge_items.title: Feature: Roles & Permissions (RBAC)
knowledge_items.content:
Role-based access control with role/permission entities, decorators that enforce permissions on routes, and admin tooling for assignment.

Status: IMPLEMENTED

Capabilities:
- Define roles and permissions
- Enforce permission via decorator
- Assign roles to business users

knowledge_items.title: Feature: Streaming CSV Export Engine
knowledge_items.content:
Reusable streaming CSV generator used across payouts, transaction, and invoice exports to produce large reports without loading them into memory.

Status: IMPLEMENTED

Capabilities:
- Stream rows to CSV without buffering the full dataset
- Format column values per shared CSV config
- Provide reusable CSV utilities for export controllers

knowledge_items.title: Feature: Payment & Merchant Notifications
knowledge_items.content:
Sends transactional SMS and email notifications for payment events, bank-detail updates, referrals, and merchant communications via Twilio and templated emails.

Status: IMPLEMENTED

Capabilities:
- Send payment receipts via SMS/email
- Notify merchants on bank-detail updates
- Send referral redemption SMS
- Bulk merchant notifications
- Render templated emails

knowledge_items.title: Feature: Pipedrive CRM Sync
knowledge_items.content:
Pushes inbound leads (signups, contact-us) into Pipedrive as persons/leads to feed the sales pipeline.

Status: IMPLEMENTED

Capabilities:
- Create Pipedrive leads from signups
- Sync person details to CRM

knowledge_items.title: Feature: Direct Debit
knowledge_items.content:
UK Direct Debit (Bacs) collection setup and management — create mandates and pull recurring payments from customer accounts.

Capabilities:

knowledge_items.title: Feature: Post-Payment Review & Feedback

- Fetch merchant review questionnaire

knowledge_items.title: Feature: Business Management & KYB

- Onboard businesses with KYB

Uploads and serves merchant assets (store images, KYB docs, exports) via AWS S3 with signed URLs.

knowledge_items.title: Feature: Invoicing, Add-ons & Pricing

- Verify Turnstile tokens against Cloudflare
- Gate auth endpoints with captcha
